# Sprinkler Design NZ
> New Zealand's leading independent BIM fire protection design and consulting firm.

## About

Sprinkler Design NZ (trading as Sprinkler Design Ltd) is New Zealand's premier independent fire protection design consultancy. Founded by Mitch Buckley — a 20+ year industry veteran — we combine deep trade knowledge with cutting-edge BIM technology to deliver precise, code-compliant fire protection across New Zealand.

We are a fully independent consultancy with no conflicts of interest, serving clients in Auckland, Wellington, Christchurch, Hamilton, and nationwide.

## Services

- **Fire Protection Consulting** — Independent end-to-end consultancy including PS1 authorship and PS4 construction monitoring for fire sprinklers, fire alarms, gas suppression, and all system types.
- **BIM Fire Protection Design & Coordination** — 3D modelling and coordination using Autodesk Revit, BIM360, and Revizto. We produce shop drawings and eliminate costly redesigns through clash-free BIM coordination.
- **Fire Protection Design for Construction** — Full lifecycle design from concept to construction documentation, covering deluge & preaction systems, foam suppression, water spray, and more.
- **Special Hazards Fire Suppression** — Bespoke solutions for high-risk environments: gas suppression, foam systems, water spray, and deluge systems.
- **3D Point Cloud Scanning** — Laser scanning technology capturing as-built data for retrofit projects and BIM integration.
- **BIM Services Management & Coordination** — Independent BIM management, BIM Execution Plans (BEP), multi-discipline coordination, and quality control.

## Key Projects

- Taranaki Base Hospital – Stage 2 (Healthcare)
- Te Kaha – Canterbury Multi-Use Arena (Sports & Entertainment)
- The Living Pā (Cultural)
- Project Punga – Kmart Rūrākura (Retail & Logistics)
- Waikeria Prison Development (Government)
- Whangārei Civic Centre (Civic)
- AALTO (High-rise Residential)

## Team

- **Mitch Buckley** — Director & Principal Fire Protection Designer. 20+ years industry experience. PS1 Author. Former network engineer who transitioned to fire protection in 2004, completing Level 3 & 4 apprenticeship. Ironman NZ finisher.
- **Laura Cullen** — Fire Protection Designer. Mechanical engineer (Beca, WSP background). Currently completing Diploma of Fire Engineering at Open Polytechnic NZ.
